reviews.comment:
Lugar bastante limpio.
Shop chico pero con lo necesario, sillas, mesas y enchufes para cargar dispositivos.
Baños chicos pero limpios y con todo lo necesario (papel, jabón, buena iluminación y secador de manos).
Atención muy cordial, nos guiaron donde ir a acampar!
Parada obligatoria ya que es la única entre Itatí - Ituzaingó.

(Translated by Google)
The place is quite clean.
The shop is small but has everything you need: chairs, tables, and outlets for charging devices.
The restrooms are small but clean and have everything you need (toilet paper, soap, good lighting, and a hand dryer). The staff was very friendly and even gave us directions to our campsite! It's a must-stop, as it's the only one between Itatí and Ituzaingó.

reviews.comment:
Pésima la atención del playero que nos atendió. No nos quiso limpiar el vidrio, porque no tenía escobilla supuestamente. Dejaron una tirada en dónde ingresas a cargar nafta y la pasaron, pero para que dejan en ese lugar donde circulan los autos??! Son unos pavos

(Translated by Google)
The service from the gas station attendant was terrible. He refused to clean our windshield, supposedly because he didn't have a wiper blade. They left one lying around where you enter to refuel and someone used it, but why leave it there where cars drive by?! They're idiots!
